hero.headline: Get Your Project RERA Registered with Professionals Law
hero.subtext: Ensure full legal compliance and boost buyer confidence with expert RERA registration support across India.

introduction.heading: Introduction and its Compliance
body: The Real Estate (Regulation and Development) Act, 2016, commonly known as RERA, was introduced by the Government of India to bring transparency, accountability and efficiency in the real estate sector. RERA mandates that all real estate projects, agents and promoters should register themselves under the respective State RERA Authority before marketing or selling any property. Professionals Law has a team that is specialized in providing RERA registration services, ensuring that promoters, builders and agents comply fully with the provisions of the Act, thus building trust with buyers and investors.

RERA compliance is very critical for safeguarding the consumer interests, avoiding legal disputes and maintaining the credibility of real estate sectors. Professionals Law helps businesses navigate the complexities of RERA rules and regulations and obtain timely registration, allowing them to operate with full legal security.

whyNeeded.heading: Why It Is Needed
body: RERA registration is mandatory for developers, promoters and real estate agents to legally advertise, market, book, sell or offer for sale any real estate project. The absence of RERA registration can lead to severe penalties and legal consequences. Professionals Law assists real estate stakeholders in securing timely registration to ensure lawful operations, enhance customer trust and avoid regulatory hurdles.

body.title: Enhanced Transparency
body.description: RERA registration ensures that all project-related information is disclosed, increasing transparency for buyers and stakeholders.

body.title: Buyer Confidence
body.description: Registered projects build customer trust as RERA mandates timely delivery, quality assurance and financial discipline.

body.title: Legal Protection
body.description: RERA registration protects promoters and agents from allegations of non-compliance and legal disputes.

body.title: Marketing Advantage
body.description: RERA-registered projects enjoy higher marketability as buyers prefer legally compliant and approved developments.

body.title: Access to Financial Institutions
body.description: Financial institutions are more likely to fund RERA-compliant projects, improving access to credit and investments.

criteria: All new real estate projects where the land area exceeds 500 square meters or where the number of apartments exceeds 8 units.
Promoters, builders, development authorities, cooperative housing societies and joint ventures.
Individuals, firms, companies or agencies involved in facilitating property sales, purchases or advertisements.

documents: Project details (land title deed, ownership documents)
Sanctioned plan, project specifications and proforma agreements
Bank account details for project-specific account
Aadhaar Card/ID proof of the individual/partners/directors
Address proof of place of business
Copy of business registration certificate (if applicable)
Income tax return or financial documents

body.description: Professionals Law experts assess the eligibility and gather required information and documents.
We prepare, verify and compile all documents necessary for filing the RERA application.
The complete application is submitted to the respective State RERA Authority through the online portal.
Government fees are calculated and paid online as per project size and nature of applicant.
Professionals Law coordinates with RERA officials for any clarifications or additional requirements.
On successful verification, the RERA Authority issues the registration certificate.
Professionals Law assists with ongoing RERA compliance such as quarterly updates, extensions and revisions.

penalties.heading: Penalties
body: For non-registration: Penalty up to 10% of the estimated project cost.
For continued default: Imprisonment up to 3 years and/or additional fine.
For providing false information: Penalty up to 5% of the project cost.
For agents: Fine of ₹10,000 per day during default, up to 5% of the property cost.
Professionals Law Private Limited ensures that all clients remain fully compliant to avoid such severe penalties.

body.title: Approval by RERA Authority
body.description: 15-30 working days (depending on state authority processing speed)

body.question: Is RERA registration mandatory for all real estate projects?
body.answer: Yes, any project exceeding 500 sq. meters or more than 8 apartments must be registered under RERA.

body.question: Can an ongoing project be registered under RERA?
body.answer: Yes, ongoing projects that have not received a completion certificate must obtain RERA registration.

body.question: Is RERA registration required for commercial projects?
body.answer: Yes. RERA applies to both residential and commercial projects.

body.question: What is the validity period of RERA registration?
body.answer: RERA registration is valid until the project completion date as specified in the registration certificate.

body.question: Can RERA registration be extended?
body.answer: Yes, extensions can be sought in case of genuine delays, subject to conditions and prior approval.

body.question: What is the penalty for non-registration?
body.answer: The penalty may be up to 10% of the estimated cost of the real estate project.

body.question: Can a real estate agent operate without RERA registration?
body.answer: No. Agents must obtain RERA registration to legally facilitate property transactions.

body.question: Does Professionals Law provide RERA compliance services after registration?
body.answer: Yes. Professionals Law Private Limited provides complete post-registration support including periodic updates, filings and compliance monitoring.

body.question: Can a promoter apply for multiple project registrations simultaneously?
body.answer: Yes, separate applications must be filed for each project under RERA.
